_note: Phase 1 demo seed credentials. These are deliberately checked-in plaintext because this file ONLY exists to bootstrap an investor-demo environment; bcrypt-hashed copies live in the SQLite DB. For any deployment outside a sandbox, either delete this file and manage accounts through an admin flow, or move these credentials to an env var and add `demo_accounts.json` to .gitignore.
_password_policy: All demo accounts share the same password for walkthrough convenience. Rotate before any public exposure.
